zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡延续
zh.content:
艾达币/美元当前整体呈震荡偏弱结构，价格持续运行于20日均线下方，短线多头动能不足，空头压制逐步显现，市场进入整理回踩阶段  

MACD指标显示动能柱持续为负且扩大，空头动能占优；均线系统中价格低于SMA20，短期反弹多受均线压制，缺乏趋势反转信号  

下方支撑关注0.164整数关口及前低区域，一旦失守或打开下行空间；上方阻力位于0.1664至0.1666区间，突破需放量确认，需警惕放量跌破  

操作建议以反弹做空或区间交易为主，避免追涨；若价格有效站稳SMA20上方，可考虑短线转多，但需严格止损控制风险波动风险较高

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD continues to exhibit a mild bearish-to-neutral structure on the lower timeframe, with price trading at 0.165136 slightly below the 20-day SMA at 0.16662275. The repeated inability to sustain moves above short-term averages suggests weakening bullish momentum. However, the narrow 24-hour range between 0.166446 and 0.164 indicates consolidation rather than an impulsive breakdown, implying the market is coiling and awaiting directional catalysts.

Momentum indicators are leaning bearish, with MACD registering a negative reading at -0.0013323379, signaling persistent downside pressure. The absence of a visible signal line reading limits crossover interpretation, but the negative histogram bias still favors sellers. Without RSI data, momentum confirmation is incomplete; however, price positioning below the 20-day SMA reinforces a short-term bearish bias, suggesting rallies may face resistance unless volume expansion supports reversal attempts.

Immediate support is located near 0.164, which has recently acted as the session low and a short-term demand zone. A decisive break below this level could open the path toward deeper liquidity around 0.162 and potentially 0.160. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 0.1666, aligned with the 20-day SMA, followed by a stronger barrier near 0.168, where prior rejections have formed.

From a trading perspective, the market favors a cautious, range-trading or short-bias approach unless price reclaims the SMA with conviction. Aggressive traders may consider short positions on rejection near 0.166–0.167 with tight risk control above resistance. Conversely, a breakout above 0.168 with volume could invalidate bearish structure and shift momentum toward 0.17. Risk management remains critical given the compressed volatility environment.
